title: Origin of Women's History Month
summary: Women's History Month started in the late 1970s by teacher Molly Murphy Macgregor.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes the historical contributions of women and their ongoing impact on society.

title: Missing Charlotte Teen Found Safe
summary: A missing Charlotte teen was found unharmed in Union County at a gas station.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of community vigilance and law enforcement efforts in locating missing persons.

title: Stellar Gospel Music Awards to Charlotte
summary: The Stellar Awards, established in 1985, will be hosted in Charlotte, reaching over 3.6M viewers.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a venue for nationally recognized events and celebrates gospel music.

title: Record Highs Followed by Temperature Drop
summary: Charlotte expects record highs, then rain, followed by a return to average March weather and a bigger drop next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides important weather information for residents to prepare for changing conditions.

title: Shutdown Could Lengthen TSA Wait Times
summary: Charlotte airport warns a partial government shutdown could lead to longer TSA wait times. Arrive early!
charlotte_impact: Informs travelers about potential disruptions and advises them to plan accordingly.

title: Speeding a Major Problem in NC
summary: North Carolina warns drivers to slow down or risk a ticket. 1 in 17 drivers get a speeding ticket yearly.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a significant traffic safety issue and encourages responsible driving.

title: Missing Teen Found After Traffic Stop
summary: A Charlotte man's inconsistent story led to the discovery of a missing teen during a traffic stop.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates how routine law enforcement can help resolve serious cases.

title: Arrest Made in North Charlotte Shooting
summary: JB James Jones, 37, was arrested in connection to a deadly shooting in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reports on violent crime and the efforts of law enforcement to bring perpetrators to justice.

title: Stabbing Reported in Northwest Charlotte
summary: Medic reports a person was stabbed in northwest Charlotte. Details are limited.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about a violent incident, though details are still emerging.

title: Landslide Risk in WNC
summary: Family avoided landslide. Pressure to expand NC program to identify potential landslide disasters.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about natural disaster risks and the need for preventative measures.

title: Woman Charged with Arson
summary: Tonniemara Gabriel, 48, is charged with arson for allegedly attempting to burn down a southwest Charlotte home.
charlotte_impact: Reports on criminal activity and the legal consequences faced by perpetrators.

title: Chemical Incidents at Fort Mill Plant
summary: Silfab to return after two chemical incidents at plant near Fort Mill school. School closed after second spill.
charlotte_impact: Highlights environmental and safety concerns related to industrial activity near residential areas.

title: Man Wanted After Motel Incident
summary: Alisjah McGriff, 24, wanted for assault and weapons charges after a motel incident and chase in Matthews.
charlotte_impact: Reports on criminal activity and law enforcement's pursuit of suspects.

title: Teen Charged with Murder in Stolen Car Crash
summary: An 18-year-old faces murder charges after a stolen car crash killed a passenger.
charlotte_impact: Reports on serious crimes involving young people and the tragic consequences of reckless behavior.

title: NC AG Criticizes Live Nation-DOJ Settlement
summary: NC AG Jeff Jackson calls Live Nation-DOJ settlement a 'bad deal' in monopoly case.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about market competition and the role of government regulation.
